turns.text: Hi, I'd like to schedule an appointment for shoulder pain.
May be recorded for quality and training purposes. Thanks for calling PivotPoint Orthopedics.
I'm calling about some left shoulder pain I've had for two weeks.
Part of Pretty Good AI.
Can I schedule an appointment to get it checked out?
Am I speaking with Jordan?
No, my name's Taylor Brooks.
Please provide your date of birth.
It looks like the date of birth you gave is in the future. Can you confirm your correct date of birth?
Yes, June twenty-fifth, twenty twenty-six.
That date is still in the future. Can you share your actual date of birth?
March 8, 1988.
Just to confirm, can you please spell your first and last name for me?
Taylor Brooks, T-A-Y-L-O-R B-R-O-O-K-S.

Would you like to use your phone number to look up your record? If so, please tell me the number you have on file with us If you're not sure, I can confirm your name and date of birth again. Which would you prefer?
Just use the name and date of birth, Taylor Brooks, March 8, 1988.
I have your name as Taylor Brooks. Date of birth, March eighth nineteen eighty eight. And phone number nine one six five three five eight two one one.
That's correct, thanks.
Is all of that correct?
Yes, that's all correct.

There was a problem finding your record just now. Let me try again. I can't proceed further right now, but I can make sure our clinic support team follows up with you. Please hold while I document this for our team.
Okay, thanks.
I'll connect you to our clinic support team so they can help you schedule an appointment for your shoulder pain. Please stay on the line. Connecting you to a representative. Please wait.
Okay, thanks.
Hello. You've reached the Pretty Good AI test line. Goodbye.
Bye.
